title: Unleashing the Power of AI in Healthcare | Hawaii Medical College
content:
Personalized Treatment Plans

AI algorithms can leverage data from millions of patient records to develop personalized treatment plans. By considering individual genetic makeup, medical history, lifestyle factors, and treatment responses, AI can recommend tailored therapies that maximize efficacy and minimize side effects. This approach, known as precision medicine, holds great promise for optimizing patient care and improving outcomes across various diseases.

title: The Role of AI in Personalized Medicine and Treatment Plans
content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) plays a key role in supporting personalized healthcare. AI systems interpret large datasets—such as genetic profiles, electronic health records (EHRs), and diagnostic results—to suggest treatment plans designed for specific patient needs. Through AI Clinical Decision-Support Tools, AI helps clinicians refine diagnoses and recommend treatments rooted in real-time, patient-specific data.

A 2023 report by the National Institutes of Health (NIH) highlighted that AI-supported personalized medicine has improved treatment responses and reduced side effects in several cancer therapies. This reinforces AI’s role in providing nuanced, evidence-based decisions at the point of care.
